Plot One or More Trips with Colony Context

Source: R/plot_maps.R
plot_trip_map.Rd

Plot One or More Trips with Colony Context

plot_trip_map(
  trip_data,
  trip_ids = NULL,
  colony_coords = NULL,
  lon_col = "longitude",
  lat_col = "latitude",
  trip_id_col = "trip_id",
  color_by = "trip_id",
  title = "Trip Map"
)

Arguments

trip_data

A track data frame containing a trip ID column.

trip_ids

Character, integer, or numeric vector of trip IDs to plot. If `NULL`, all trips are shown.

colony_coords

Optional named numeric vector with `lon` and `lat`.

lon_col

Character. Longitude column. Default is `"longitude"`.

lat_col

Character. Latitude column. Default is `"latitude"`.

trip_id_col

Character. Trip ID column. Default is `"trip_id"`.

color_by

Character. Column to color-code trips by. Default is `"trip_id"`.

title

Character. Plot title.

Value

A `ggplot2` plot object.

Contents

Developed by Cooper Owen.
